## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checks

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior changed.

## Accessibility and Evidence

- [ ] Semantic HTML / ARIA impact reviewed.
- [ ] Keyboard behavior reviewed.
- [ ] Forced-colors / high-contrast impact reviewed.
- [ ] Evidence packet updated or not applicable.
- [ ] No compliance guarantees added.

## Security and Provenance

- [ ] No unsafe registry, install, update, or MCP behavior introduced.
- [ ] No secrets or private infrastructure details committed.
- [ ] Supply-chain impact reviewed.

## Positioning

- [ ] Does not imply official USWDS, GSA, NDS, or federal endorsement.
